    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull Event>
    EventRepository.findAll(org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Find every event.
    org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull Event>
    EventRepository.findByCategoriesIn(List<String> categories, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Find events that contain at least one of the specified topics
    org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull Event>
    EventRepository.findByCategoriesInAndStartingDateGreaterThanEqual(List<String> categories, LocalDate date, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Find every event containing at least one of the specified topics and starting at the specified date or later
    org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull Event>
    EventRepository.findByPosition_CityName(String cityName, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Find events of a specific city
    org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull Event>
    EventRepository.findByPositionLocationNear(org.springframework.data.geo.Point location, org.springframework.data.geo.Distance distance, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Given the coordinates of a point [lon, lat], find every event near that point, given a maximum admissible distance
    org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull Event>
    EventRepository.findByStartingDateGreaterThanEqual(LocalDate startingDate, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Find events that start at the specified date or later
